name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight for the filibuster & against leftist bullies – details inside
body:
| |
---
I have two important announcements for you today.
|
---
Announcement #1
Mr. Smith Goes to Washington House Party
The first one is a save the date announcement about our next house party event. We will be asking you and others across the country to host Mr. Smith Goes to Washington house parties on April 15th (or sometime over that following weekend), to educate friends and family about the Senate filibuster, and why it is so important to the survival of our republic.

Democrats are incredibly close to eliminating the filibuster, in order to pass multiple, radical, left-wing bills that would transform America into something unrecognizable. They can’t do that without getting rid of the filibuster. Too few Americans know this is happening, and why it matters. The movie, Mr. Smith Goes to Washington – an iconic Jimmy Stewart film – is a fun and interesting way to educate them.

Once they understand, they will be more likely to take action and put pressure on the Senate to keep the filibuster. Without the filibuster, the Democrats will pass amnesty, gun control, the Green New Deal, the Corrupt Politicians Act to legalize election fraud, radical abortion laws, the so-called “Equality” Act that erases women and threatens children and religious liberty, and more.

**So, please mark your calendars and[sign up today](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDkzLWY3MDdjZTA4NDJlZDRjZTY4YjE5MDc2NjY5NzJmYzA1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvTkY2aUhmeGthWnVibWV4RTc_bWlkPTQzNTg4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=b_vTVVhI_YPWXNhIQXl3MQ)!**

**You should start inviting people now, too. Just let them know you will send out more details soon – that way they get it on their calendars as well.**

Additionally, please consider [financially supporting this project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDkzLWY3MDdjZTA4NDJlZDRjZTY4YjE5MDc2NjY5NzJmYzA1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM1ODgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=zmIHrPPQANm2L2JJoCUMvg), if you are able. We will use your gift to put the host packets together and to ship them out!

Finally, keep an eye out for more details, and [don’t forget to sign up today!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDkzLWY3MDdjZTA4NDJlZDRjZTY4YjE5MDc2NjY5NzJmYzA1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvTkY2aUhmeGthWnVibWV4RTc_bWlkPTQzNTg4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=bHAr4RwRLYHuztqdigAIJg) If you know other people who would like to host a house party, please send them this email or the sign-up link!
|
---
Announcement #2
Major League Baseball: Stay out of Politics & Play Ball
Our friends at Americans for Limited Government launched a campaign to counteract pressure, from the left, on Major League Baseball (MLB) to move their All Star Game out of Georgia.

Like clockwork, the left began bullying companies headquartered in Georgia before the election integrity bills had even passed. After they were signed into law by Governor Kemp, the left intensified their bullying campaign.

It’s time to stop the left from bullying American companies into doing their bidding. If you want to fight back, and support election integrity, all you have to do is [head over to the activism page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDkzLWY3MDdjZTA4NDJlZDRjZTY4YjE5MDc2NjY5NzJmYzA1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL21sYi1zdGF5LW91dC1vZi1wb2xpdGljcy1wbGF5LWJhbGw_bWlkPTQzNTg4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=vIteIwiFkeD51cF0uJwa0g) and click a couple of buttons to email the MLB Commissioner. After that, the website gives you the option to tweet out a couple of pre-written tweets as well.

It couldn’t be easier or faster, so please do it as soon as you can, before it’s too late, and MLB folds to the left, and make sure to share it on social media and email!

[FIGHT THE BULLYING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDkzLWY3MDdjZTA4NDJlZDRjZTY4YjE5MDc2NjY5NzJmYzA1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL21sYi1zdGF5LW91dC1vZi1wb2xpdGljcy1wbGF5LWJhbGw_bWlkPTQzNTg4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1rkXz1wRkr4AdJfPfvb7Ow)
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|

name: Giffords.org
subject: We'll get your message to Congress
body:
#

Friends,
It's no surprise that a majority of Americans want Congress to pass universal background checks. Over 90% of Americans agree there should be a simple background check before acquiring a firearm.
We expect universal background checks to come up for a vote in the Senate in the coming weeks. So we need to show that Americans want this bill to pass immediately.
The Senate will only pass background checks if they believe the American people support it.
So in order to continue making progress, we need you to make your voice heard. We like to ask this from time to time, and especially now that we are so close to success. So what do you say?
[**Can you take our short background checks survey? This is really important. The more people who speak up and let their senators know this is a priority, the more likely we will be to succeed.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16d/78fba3aa/63475179/50aad838/2678259507/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/universal-background-checks-survey-2021?source=em210403-1-full")
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16d/78fba3aa/63475179/50aad838/2678259507/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/universal-background-checks-survey-2021?source=em210403-1-full")**
Your opinions about universal background checks are so important to us. When you speak up, and so do thousands of others, we can use our collective voices to urge the Senate to act quickly.
We are doing everything we can to make sure that firearms don't end up in the hands of people who shouldn't have them. Your feedback will really help us as we urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16d/78fba3aa/63475179/50aad838/2678259507/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/universal-background-checks-survey-2021?source=em210403-1-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16d/78fba3aa/63475179/50aad83b/2678259507/VEsC/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: From Your Capitol – Big Government and Higher Taxes
body:
From Your Capitol – Big Government and Higher Taxes
---
| | | | |
---
**From Your Capitol – Big Government and Higher Taxes**
| |
---
| | This was the thirteenth and final week of the 2021 Legislative Session. We completed the last day on Thursday, April 1, after working through the weekend to finalize the state budget. While many significant pieces of legislation did not make it through the process this year, several did and will now be signed into law by the governor. As always there were wins and loses in the political process. Some of the positive changes that survived included,
* The Dignity for Incarcerated Women Act will elevate the level of care for female inmates by limiting use of restraints on inmates giving birth, by providing feminine hygiene products for inmates who are in need and by placing incarcerated mothers within a certain distance to their minor children.
* Mississippians will be able to purchase pseudoephedrine and ephedrine from pharmacies without a prescription.
* Veterans are now authorized to establish proof of military service for a Veteran Driver’s License Designation in person at DPS driver’s license stations across the state.
* Mississippi schools are now required to designate sports teams based on biological sex.

I am saddned to report that the failures seem larger than the wins this year. This is particularly disheartening when we consider the fact that we have a super-majority of Republicans in the legislature and throughout state government. It's disappointing when Republican leadership bow to liberal ideology instead of standing up for the principles of the people who elected them. One huge failure was the gun bill that Rep. Shane Barnett worked on all session. This bill would have made positive changes and advanced the rights of Mississippi citizens. Unfortunately, leadership bowed to the will The Mississippi Institute of Higher Learning (IHL). IHL proved themselves to be the most liberal anti-freedom, anti-gun agency in our state. Legislative leadership was more concerned about their season tickets to football games than the freedom of our citizens. IHL even opposed a simple resolution to affirm our commitment to the Bill of Rights. If the leadership of our universities and colleges refuse to affirm their commitment to our US Constitution and our Bill of Rights, we are in deep trouble. I am glad that none of my children are immersed in the liberal ideology of our state universities and colleges. It was also disappointing to see Republicans who profess to believe in lower taxes and less government do everything in their power to increase government spending and take as much money as possible from the people of Mississippi. In a year where the federal government sent the state of Mississippi almost $3.5 billion our government refused to even consider reducing the tax burden on the citizens. We saw the budget balloon with over 4% increases across the board, and an increase in our state debt of almost half a billion dollars. The fact is, in 2021 the Mississippi legislature spent your money on pet project, increases in salaries, and general mis-spending like drunken sailors after six months at sea. I regret that I don't have a more positive report to bring the people of Mississippi regarding your 2021 legislature. I find the Mississippi legislature to be largely unresponsive to the people who elected them, unwilling to adhere to the principles and values of the Republican party on which they campaigned, and generally concerned only about their personal gain and re-election. If the people of Mississippi don't hold their elected officials responsible and require they adhere to the conservative principles of lower taxes, less government and more freedom, our freedom and liberties will soon be lost. Dana

I find the Mississippi legislature to be largely unresponsive to the people who elected them, unwilling to adhere to the principles and values of the Republican party on which they campaigned, and generally concerned only about their personal gain and re-election. If the people of Mississippi don't hold their elected officials responsible and require they adhere to the conservative principles of lower taxes, less government and more freedom, our freedom and liberties will soon be lost. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats Attack Mort
body:
|
---
Action 4 Liberty PAC
Peter -- Do you know what happens when you go to St Paul to break up the dirty politics that have dominated the Capitol for decades? Both the Democrat and Republican Establishment go after you. That's what is happening to our Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen right now. As you well know, I'm not too kind to most politicians. There's a reason for that - the majority of them are voting against our liberties. But when we have a champion in office, we make sure to have his or her back! **Since Day One, Rep Erik Mortensen (Mort) has been willing to stand up against the political class to[Make Walz Pay](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhe4sRbnUflb_5wm48h7_RNcbvu5D3ezmf8_8aGoiUA-Y&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2021&n=1) for what he's done to Minnesota. In Mort's first speech, and the first time he even spoke on the House floor, he was challenging the Speaker of the House on the rules so we could get a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. That's a true champion!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhcQ4ToGmMGPhwd0DKGw20LNfs7lUO9Vix8BKuGKSrNx_&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2021&n=2) Because Mort takes courageous stances for you and me, he is hated in the smoked filled, backrooms in St Paul. Just this week, the Democrat Establishment, with the secret help of Republican Minority Leader Kurt Daudt, filed a baseless Campaign Finance complaint against Mort. They knew the allegation was ridiculous, but they wanted a headline to hurt Mort in the press. Actually, they want to hurt you and me. And that's precisely what they did. The DFL sent out a press release and their friends in the far left media wrote up the stories so enemies can use it against Mort. Especially his pitiful opponent Brad Tabke, who we helped remove from office last November. **This isn't the first time the Democrats have used official government agencies to make political attacks.
